sqlMap.select: select * from AttorneyDetailsLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and DesignationId = #DesignationId#
sqlMap.insert: insert into AttorneyDetailsLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey AttorneyName DesignationId LicensedStates AnnualWorkedHours NumberOfYearsInPractice NumberOfYearsWithFirm NumberOfYearsMalpracticeCov AttorneyPriorActDate LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp PriorActDate IsNonRatedAttorney VersionKey ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #AttorneyName# #DesignationId# #LicensedStates# #AnnualWorkedHours# #NumberOfYearsInPractice# #NumberOfYearsWithFirm# #NumberOfYearsMalpracticeCov# #AttorneyPriorActDate# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #PriorActDate# #IsNonRatedAttorney# #VersionKey# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('AttorneyDetailsLW') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select AttorneyKey, AttorneyName, DesignationId, LicensedStates, AnnualWorkedHours, NumberOfYearsInPractice, NumberOfYearsWithFirm, NumberOfYearsMalpracticeCov, AttorneyPriorActDate, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, PriorActDate, IsNonRatedAttorney, VersionKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from AttorneyDetailsLW where AttorneyKey = #AttorneyKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update AttorneyDetailsLW set
AttorneyName = #AttorneyName# AttorneyName = null DesignationId = #DesignationId# DesignationId = null LicensedStates = #LicensedStates# LicensedStates = null AnnualWorkedHours = #AnnualWorkedHours# AnnualWorkedHours = null NumberOfYearsInPractice = #NumberOfYearsInPractice# NumberOfYearsInPractice = null NumberOfYearsWithFirm = #NumberOfYearsWithFirm# NumberOfYearsWithFirm = null NumberOfYearsMalpracticeCov = #NumberOfYearsMalpracticeCov# NumberOfYearsMalpracticeCov = null AttorneyPriorActDate = #AttorneyPriorActDate# AttorneyPriorActDate = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null PriorActDate = #PriorActDate# PriorActDate = null IsNonRatedAttorney = #IsNonRatedAttorney# IsNonRatedAttorney = null VersionKey = #VersionKey# VersionKey = null
where AttorneyKey = #AttorneyKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from AttorneyDetailsLW where AttorneyKey = #AttorneyKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from AttorneyDetailsLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and DesignationId = #DesignationId#
sqlMap.select: select AttorneyKey, AttorneyName, DesignationId, LicensedStates, AnnualWorkedHours, NumberOfYearsInPractice, NumberOfYearsWithFirm, NumberOfYearsMalpracticeCov, AttorneyPriorActDate, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, PriorActDate, IsNonRatedAttorney, VersionKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from AttorneyDetailsLW where AttorneyKey = #AttorneyKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select AttorneyKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, AttorneyName, DesignationId, LicensedStates, AnnualWorkedHours, NumberOfYearsInPractice, NumberOfYearsWithFirm, NumberOfYearsMalpracticeCov, AttorneyPriorActDate, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, PriorActDate, IsNonRatedAttorney, VersionKey from AttorneyDetailsLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and DesignationId = #DesignationId#
